text:
Education is the process of facilitating learning, or the acquisition of knowledge, skills, values, beliefs, and habits.
Educational methods include teaching, training, storytelling, discussion and directed research.
Education frequently takes place under the guidance of educators, however learners can also educate themselves.
Education can take place in formal or informal settings and any experience that has a formative effect on the way one thinks, feels, or acts may be considered educational.

he way one thinks, feels, or acts may be considered educational.
The history of education can be traced back to ancient times, where knowledge was passed down through oral traditions.
In modern times, education is often structured into stages such as primary school, secondary school, and higher education.
The importance of education in society cannot be overstated, as it empowers individuals and drives economic growth.
